---
name: Feature request
about: Have an idea for something that would make OpenEmu-Silicon better? We'd love to hear it.
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

Thanks for taking the time to share this — suggestions from people actually using the app are the best ones.

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Describe the feature or improvement in plain language. What would it do? -->

## Why would this be useful?

<!-- What problem would it solve, or what would it make better? Is this something you run into often? -->

## Have you tried any workarounds?

<!-- Is there a way you're currently handling this without the feature? Even a partial workaround is worth mentioning. -->

## Is this specific to Apple Silicon or macOS?

<!-- Does this relate to something unique to running on M-series Macs, or is it a general OpenEmu feature request? -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Screenshots, links, examples from other apps — anything that helps explain what you have in mind. -->

<!-- Note: This project is maintained by one person using AI assistance. Feature requests are very welcome, but timelines are unpredictable. The best way to see something happen faster is to open a PR. -->
